---
title: "BVD2 Efficacy"
author: "Olivia Rippee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
# devtools::install_github("ABS-dev/PF")
library(PF)
library(flextable)
```

```{r data}

file_path <- "efficacy_data.xlsx"

all_sheets_list <- file_path %>%
  excel_sheets() %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map(~ read_excel(path = file_path, sheet = .x))

invisible(list2env(all_sheets_list, envir = .GlobalEnv))  # Map sheets to R dataframes

# Clean dataframes
# -----------------
Mortality <- Mortality %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

Leukopenia <- Leukopenia %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub(" ", "_", .)) %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

# CS Note: yes = any clinical event greater than or equal to 2 with or without fever 
# (fever does not need to occur with clinical signs)

ClinicalSigns <- na.omit(`CS with or without Fever`) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub(" ", "_", .)) %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

# Stringent data
# ----------------
ClinicalSigns_stringent <- read_xlsx("C:/Users/ORippee/OneDrive - Kemin Industries/R&D - Olivia/R Code/Stats/BVD2 Efficacy/Data/BVD2 response - Stringent classification vacc and controls stats table.xlsx", sheet=3)

ClinicalSigns_stringent <- ClinicalSigns_stringent %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub(" ", "_", .)) %>%
  mutate(Group = if_else(Group == "Vaccinate", "Vaccine", Group))

```


```{r fxn}

# P-value formatting function
# ----------------------------
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 0.0001) {
    output <- "< 0.0001"
  } else {output <- sprintf("%.4f", p)}}


# 5-number summary formatting function
# -------------------------------------
format_integer <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x %% 1 == 0,
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0),
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2))}


# Prevented fraction analysis
#-----------------------------
run_prevented_fraction_analysis <- function(data, outcome_var, label_col_name) {
  outcome_sym <- sym(outcome_var)
  
  # Summarize counts and proportions
  summary_counts <- data %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarize(
      Positive = sum(toupper(!!outcome_sym) == "YES"),
      Total    = n(),
      Prop     = Positive / Total,
      .groups = "drop")
  
  # 2x2 contingency table
  ct <- table(data$Group, toupper(data[[outcome_var]]))
  
  # Exact Prevented Fraction using RRtosst()
  # Input: c(y1, n1, y2, n2) where y = positives, n = totals
  # Group order: Vaccine (exposed) vs Control (unexposed)
  rr_exact <- RRtosst(
    c(
      ct["Vaccine", "YES"], sum(ct["Vaccine", ]),
      ct["Control", "YES"], sum(ct["Control", ])),
    pf = TRUE)
  
  PF_vac       <- rr_exact$estimate["PF"]
  Lower_CI_vac <- rr_exact$estimate["LL"]
  Upper_CI_vac <- rr_exact$estimate["UL"]
  
  # Fisher Exact test p-value
  fisher_p <- fisher.test(ct)$p.value
  
  # Build summary table
  summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
    arrange(Group) %>%
    mutate(
      `Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "Control", "1 = Control", "2 = Vaccine"),
      !!label_col_name :=
        paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
      `Prevented Fraction` =
        ifelse(Group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", PF_vac), ""),
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
        ifelse(Group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", Lower_CI_vac), ""),
      `Fisher Exact p-value` =
        ifelse(Group == "Control", format.pval(fisher_p, digits = 3), "")) %>%
    select(
      `Treatment Group`,
      !!label_col_name,
      `Prevented Fraction`,
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
      `Fisher Exact p-value`)
  
  return(summary_table)}


# Format flextable
#-------------------
format_flextable <- function(summary_table, caption_text) {
  flextable(summary_table) %>%
    set_caption(caption_text) %>%
    autofit() %>%
    align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
    fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>%
    fontsize(size = 11, part = "all")}

```

# Mortality

```{r mortality}

mortality_table <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = Mortality, outcome_var = "Mortality", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Mortality")

format_flextable(mortality_table, "Incidence of Mortality")

```

<br>

# Leukopenia

```{r leukopenia}

leukopenia_table <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = Leukopenia, outcome_var = "Leukopenia", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Positive Cases")

format_flextable(leukopenia_table, "Incidence of Leukopenia")

```

<br>

# Clinical Signs with or without Fever

```{r clinical signs}

clinical_table <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = ClinicalSigns, outcome_var = "Clinical_Signs_of_BVD2", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Positive Cases")

format_flextable(clinical_table, 
                 "Incidence of Clinical Signs (with or without fever)")

```

<br>

# Clinical Signs (Stringent Criteria)

```{r clinical signs stringent}

clinical_table_stringent <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = ClinicalSigns_stringent, outcome_var = "BVD_Case_Stringent_Criteria", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Positive Cases")

format_flextable(clinical_table_stringent, 
                 "Incidence of Clinical Signs (Stringent Criteria)")

```
